rationale: Both correctly diagnose the config/tokenizer mismatch (base tokenizer lacks <img_ratio_33..36>, hunyuan_image_3_moe.yaml forces the two-stage Instruct topology) and give the same verified DiT-config workaround, matching the thread. X is slightly more grounded (cites yaml header lines, the downstream _all_ratio_ids builder, and proposes a two-part fix mirroring the thread's own doc+guard proposal) and more complete, explicitly addressing Gaohan123's final request to track the improvement in a new issue. Y omits that closing instruction and its output includes redundant duplicated draft text, making it slightly less polished and complete.
